title: Roga
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:Roga.jpg|thumb|Concept art of rogas attacking a [[Droid/Legends|droid]] on [[Geonosis/Legends|Geonosis]].]]
'''Rogas''' were insectile creatures indigenous to [[Geonosis/Legends|Geonosis]].
The roga was a [[Species/Legends|species]] of squat, six-legged [[Insectoid/Legends|insectoid]] that possessed a mouth surrounded by grasping mandibles, as well as a pair of feathery antennae atop its head. Some [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] scientists theorized that the [[Geonosian/Legends|Geonosians]] may have evolved from an ancient form of the roga.

==Behind the scenes==
In the initial drafts of [[Star Wars: Episode II Attack of the Clones|''Attack of the Clones'']], a group of these creatures were intended to attack [[R4-P17/Legends|R4-P17]] shortly after [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] landed on [[Geonosis/Legends|Geonosis]]. However, they were cut from the film.
